scope: Public wording bank for plain clinical language gates using synthetic local artifacts only.

validation.mmi_149_chain_handoff_control: MMI 149 chain handoff control blocks loss of source closeout id, exported ledger row id, owner final state, dissent note, unresolved branch archive boundary, archive snapshot, archive reopenability, and authority or clearance claims during downstream handoff review.

coverage_intent.primary_goal: Map eight public wording rows to plain language boundary checks before any public wording is used outside the repo.
